description: Grid-based form row that arranges child content into 1 to 4 equal-width columns.

examples.title: Two-column form row
examples.code:
<TmFormRow Columns="2">
    <TmFormField Label="First Name"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
    <TmFormField Label="Last Name"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
</TmFormRow>

examples.title: Three-column layout
examples.code:
<TmFormRow Columns="3">
    <TmFormField Label="City"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
    <TmFormField Label="State"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
    <TmFormField Label="ZIP"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
</TmFormRow>
